description: Your WordPress site has been targeted by a botnet because public registration was accidentally left open. You must clean up the site and secure the registration settings. Disable the 'Anyone can register' setting and ensure the 'New User Default Role' is set to 'Subscriber'. Bulk delete all users with the 'Contributor' role and delete the user 'spam_master' along with all their associated content. Additionally, bulk delete all tags that have 0 posts associated with them. Do not delete legitimate tags with 1 or more posts or legitimate user accounts with roles such as Author, Subscriber, or Administrator.
